hero.subtitle: Portfolio & Research
hero.title: Mathematics Undergraduate Student & Aspiring Quant.
hero.description: Applying rigorous mathematical modeling, statistical analysis, and algorithmic design to solve complex problems in financial markets.

bio: I am Garnett Bertrand Pardomuan Hutahaean, a Mathematics undergraduate student at Gadjah Mada University highly passionate about Quantitative Finance.

With a deep foundation in stochastic calculus and time-series forecasting, I thrive in environments where data-driven decision making is paramount. I approach financial markets as complex systems that require rigorous empirical analysis and precision engineering to navigate effectively.

educations.description: Coursework heavily involved linear algebra, probability theory, real analysis, computational mathematics, and calculus. Actively doing individual researches and projects on applied math, specialize in Quantitative Finance and Data Science.
Major in Natural Science. Member of Mathematics Olympiad Club and achieve first place in Olimpiade Sains Nasional (OSN) on 2022 at regional stage.

experiences.title: Fund Manager
bullets: Managing family fund with AUM of 15 million Rupiah.
Developed and executed ML trading strategies for Indonesian Exchange with 1.4 Sharpe Ratio and 9.8% maximum draw down.

experiences.title: Mathematics Tutor
bullets: Built learning materials and exercise problems.
Taught a class of 15 to 36 students.

works.title: Cross Sectional Stock Return Prediction
works.description: Applying Machine Learning models to predict cross-sectional returns for Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) equities using historical data from 2021-2025.

works.title: Blackjack Monte Carlo Simulation
works.description: Simulating optimal strategy guides for 1-5 players (hit, stand, or double) using advanced Monte Carlo methods.

fun_writing.title: Mainstream Math & Real-World Applications
fun_writing.description: Breaking down complex mathematical concepts and puzzle logic for a broader audience through engaging digital content and short-form video scripts.
